SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 CommentRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.CommentRepository
public class CommentRepository extends Object
Repository class for handling comment operations in Firestore.

This repository acts as the data access layer between the application and the Firestore backend. It provides methods for:

  • Adding new comments to an event
  • Retrieving comments for a specific event (ordered newest first)
  • Deleting comments (admin/organizer functionality)
  • Reporting comments (increments report count and tracks reporting users)
  • Retrieving all comments in the system (admin functionality)

All operations use Firestore's real-time capabilities and return results via callback interfaces to handle asynchronous operations.

另请参阅:
  • Comment
  • EventDetailFragment
  • AdminBrowseCommentsFragment

  • 嵌套类概要

    嵌套类
    修饰符和类型
    类
    说明
    static interface 
    CommentRepository.CommentsCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a list of comments.
    static interface 
    CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback
    Callback interface for simple repository operations (add, delete, report).

    说明
    CommentRepository()
    Constructs a new CommentRepository and initializes Firestore.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    addComment(Comment comment, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback callback)
    Adds a new comment to the Firestore database.
    void

    Deletes a comment from Firestore by its document ID.
    void

    Retrieves all comments from the entire system.
    void

    Retrieves all comments for a specific event.
    void
    reportComment(String commentId, String userId, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback callback)
    Reports a comment, incrementing its report count and adding the reporting user.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • CommentRepository

      public CommentRepository()
      Constructs a new CommentRepository and initializes Firestore. The comments are stored in the comments collection.

  • 方法详细资料

    • addComment

      public void addComment(Comment comment, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback callback)
      Adds a new comment to the Firestore database.

      After successful addition, the comment's document ID is set on the Comment object for future reference.

      参数:
      comment - the comment to add (should have eventId, commentText, userId, userName, userDeviceId set)
      callback - callback invoked with success/failure result

    • getCommentsForEvent

      public void getCommentsForEvent(String eventId, CommentRepository.CommentsCallback callback)
      Retrieves all comments for a specific event.

      Comments are ordered by timestamp in descending order (newest first) to show the most recent comments at the top.

      参数:
      eventId - the ID of the event to fetch comments for
      callback - callback invoked with the list of comments (empty list if none found)

    • deleteComment

      public void deleteComment(String commentId, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback callback)
      Deletes a comment from Firestore by its document ID.

      This method is typically called by administrators or event organizers to remove inappropriate content.

      参数:
      commentId - the Firestore document ID of the comment to delete
      callback - callback invoked with success/failure result

    • reportComment

      public void reportComment(String commentId, String userId, CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback callback)
      Reports a comment, incrementing its report count and adding the reporting user.

      Uses Firestore's FieldValue.increment(1) to atomically increase the report count and FieldValue.arrayUnion(userId) to add the user to the reportedBy list without duplicates.

      参数:
      commentId - the Firestore document ID of the comment to report
      userId - the ID of the user reporting the comment
      callback - callback invoked with success/failure result

    • getAllComments

      public void getAllComments(CommentRepository.CommentsCallback callback)
      Retrieves all comments from the entire system.

      Comments are ordered by timestamp in descending order (newest first). This method is primarily used by administrators in AdminBrowseCommentsFragment to view and moderate all comments in the system.

      参数:
      callback - callback invoked with the list of all comments (empty list if none found)
